rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when concrete bounds or visible feature names are provided.
Use visible identifiers to define range assumptions and guarantees in AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Use boolean helper declarations to express range conditions in AGREE.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must use valid AADL component scopes for assumptions and guarantees.
Guarantees should reference visible features or named constants when defining ranges.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts.
Do not use subcomponent ports directly in type-level AGREE contracts.
